title: Identifying which components in your system need a mandatory human checkpoint

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: A decision-flow diagram showing the component-level method: each component enters a three-branch Q1/Q2/Q3 evaluation tree leading to an oversight assignment (HITL / HOTL / HOOTL), with upgrade-signal arrows showing when a lower assignment promotes to a higher one.
depth_profile_signals: title is a procedural how-to with 3+ sub-questions (which components, what method, what threshold)
Core Concepts has 7 sub-sections including a worked example and signal taxonomy
Assessment 3 tie-in adds implementation depth but not deep-topic breadth
word count lands mid-range standard at ~3600
